events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's big day
angles.copy: Happy 86th to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar legend's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's milestone
angles.copy: 83 years young! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track that still makes you move?

events.title: MTV launched with Buggles' first video
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's birth
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? It all started 45 years ago today with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud, music, and peace of Woodstock. Which legendary performance from '69 do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the influential Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year. His music still resonates decades later.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84.

angles.name: Hendrix tribute
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. What's your favourite track from the guitar legend?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road milestone
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. The album cover alone is legendary. What's your go-to track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are timeless. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and former Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally. What does it mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, which went on sale November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod's debut
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who is your definitive 007, and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's birthday tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His legacy of peace and music lives on. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
